name: python3-inflection
title: python3-inflection
summary: Port of Ruby on Rails' inflector (Python 3)
description:
Port of Ruby on Rails' inflector (Python 3)
Inflection is a string transformation library. It singularizes and
pluralizes English words, and transforms strings from CamelCase
to underscored string.
.
This package contains the module for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-inflection because Port of Ruby on Rails' inflector (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-inflection as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-inflection with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-inflection --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
